title: Remote Access and Network Management Paths · Protocol Clinic: Net Inband Outofband
summary: Provide secure operator, vendor, and user connectivity with recoverable in-band and out-of-band paths. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net inband outofband increment in a least-privilege management access plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare in-band and out-of-band management paths and preserve isolated recovery without creating an unmonitored bypass.
Use a hardened jump host as a controlled management choke point with MFA, recording, patching, and limited reach.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
